1111.content: Aelita was in her room when she heard a knock on the door. She goes to open it and finds Brandon standing outside. She let's him in and the second the door is closed, Brandon pulls her skirt down to her ankles,exposing her pink flower printed panties,making aelita blush. Brandon grabs her panties and yanks them up,soon lifting her off the ground. He began to bounce aelita by her panties causing her to squeal. After a few minutes of bouncing, he brings her panties over her face and brings her over his knee. Brandon gave aelita a spanking for the next few minutes, until her butt was bright red. Brandon let's her up and she attempts to get her panties off her head as Brandon watches her. After a few minutes she managed to get her panties off her head and she picks out her wedgie. She then bends down to pull her skirt back up,but before she can Brandon grabs her panties and lifts her off the ground. He began to bounce her for a few minutes until he decided to take her shirt off. Brandon takes her shirt off and attaches her panties to her bra. She is then allowed to put her shirt and skirt back on and the two go out to get ice cream. The two walk to a nearby ice cream shop and sit as a table as they enjoy their ice cream. Aelita gets a bit of ice cream on her face and Brandon brings her to the bathroom to clean her up. He brings her in front of a toilet and shoves her face into the water while flushing the handle. After a few minutes of giving her swirlies,Brandon let's her up and the two leave the ice cream store and begin to head back to aelita's dormitory room. Before getting there, Brandon brings aelita into an alley and Brandon pulls her skirt down again. She blushes a bit as Brandon grabs her panties and yanks her off the ground. He bounces her for a bit before hanging her up on a fence at the back of the alley. Brandon leaves her there and heads to a nearby clothing store. He purchases a pink pair of panties that had wings printed on them. The pair was a brand designed to be extra stretchy and was a bigger size than aelita wore. He also purchased a light blue pair of panties that had a rainbow on the butt. Brandon exited the store and went to where he left aelita. Once there he saw that aelita was still hanging by her panties and that they were wet from peeing herself. Aelita had a big blush on her face as Brandon walked up and started pulling down on her legs to get her panties to rip. After a few minutes he was successful and she fell to the ground. He handed her the rainbow panties and turned around so she could put them on. Once she has her panties on,the two walk back to her dormitory room. Once they get in Brandon reaches down her skirt and yanks her panties up to her shoulders. He lifts her off the ground and begins to bounce her for a few minutes until finally her panties rip and she falls to the ground. Brandon helps her up and hands her the other pair of panties he bought for her. The pink wing printed panties were a couple sizes too big for her,so when Brandon turned her around and yanked the panties up they stretched higher than her head in one pull. She groans and squeals as Brandon begins to wrap the oversized panties around her body. After a few minutes,she was completely wrapped up in her panties except her for mouth and butt. Brandon bent down and began to give her butt a series of smacks,soon turning it bright red. He then lifts her up by her panties and places her on her bed. He gives a few more smacks to her butt before leaving the room and heading home.
